preview.title: Cohort A vs B significance summary
preview.snippet: Primary endpoint p=0.03 (n=412). 2 caveats: protocol deviation in site 7, dropout asymmetry.

preview.title: Safety signal scan — week 7
preview.snippet: 3 SAEs in treatment arm, 1 in control. Reviewer flag: GI bleed cluster needs DSMB attention.

preview.title: Subgroup: renal-impaired cohort
preview.snippet: Effect attenuates in eGFR<60 (HR 1.08, 95% CI 0.81–1.45). Underpowered for confirmatory.

preview.title: Missing-data audit
preview.snippet: Weekly summary: 12% missingness on day-28 PRO, primarily site 3. Multiple imputation sensitivity attached.
